objective: Fail closed before publishing an independent-review bundle unless every immutable queue dossierId can produce a completed receipt valid under the frozen review schema.
checks: validate all input hashes before assessing compatibility
require the proposal and queue to remain awaiting independent review
require exactly two hash-valid immutable dossiers and zero receipts
evaluate every queued dossierId against the frozen schema pattern
require review-schema semantics to match the dossier evidence and counterevidence structure
require every mandatory policy finding to have a dedicated hash-bound provider-primary locator
forbid aliases that would break queue and dossier identity
publish no bundle, worksheet or receipt template when compatibility fails
nextAllowedAction: Version a dedicated independent-review schema that accepts the exact immutable policy-redesign dossier IDs, or version the proposal and dossiers with schema-compatible canonical IDs; then repeat this handoff gate without mutating E14.7n
